depth_pass: A2 Targeted Depth Block 2 — Key Exhibit Clause Walk

exhibits_walked.source_method: Body cross-references (Item 17 chart) + FLA TOC + targeted page reads

key_clauses.content: Non-exclusive franchise grant for territory; franchisee may not operate internet business without authorization
Ends June 1 following 10th full Tax Season after Effective Date
No automatic renewal; franchisor may offer successor franchise at sole discretion under then-current, potentially materially different terms
Tiered 60%/40%/20% with early-pay discounts; Product-Specific Royalties on business services (15%/10%), POM (20%), Second Look (20%)
During term: 45 miles. Post-term: 25 miles, 2 years + non-solicitation. Subject to state law.
30 days notice + 25% of 3-year average gross sales payment
De-identification, file return, phone/lease assignment, 2-year real property restriction
Missouri law; Jackson County, MO courts

deferred_sections.reason: Definitional; key defined terms covered via operative sections
Standard boilerplate (representations, remedies, non-waiver, amendments, counterparts, headings, acknowledgments)

exhibits_walked.reason: Standard release form; operative scope is release of all claims upon renewal/transfer. Limited by state amendments in CA, IL, MD, MN, ND, WA, WI.
exhibits_walked.what_recovered_elsewhere: Release scope identified from Item 17 chart and state amendment analysis

exhibits_walked.exhibit: H-1 — Term Loan Credit and Security Agreement
exhibits_walked.what_recovered: Key terms from Item 10 body text: interest rate (Prime+3%), 2% admin fee, 4-10 year term, no prepayment penalty, collateral, cross-default, personal guarantee, remedies
exhibits_walked.what_remains_missing: Detailed security agreement schedules, specific collateral descriptions, detailed event of default definitions beyond what Item 10 discloses

exhibits_walked.exhibit: H-2 — Short-Term Loan Credit and Security Agreement
exhibits_walked.what_recovered: Key terms from Item 10: 7-month term (Sep-Apr), 20% of prior year revenue limit, collateral, cross-default
exhibits_walked.what_remains_missing: Detailed schedules and specific default mechanics

exhibits_walked.reason: 33-page FDA governing financial product distribution through approved banking partner. Annual electronic acceptance required. Key obligation: franchisee must offer products only through approved banking partner.
exhibits_walked.what_recovered_elsewhere: Key obligations from Items 1, 8 body text
exhibits_walked.what_remains_missing: Detailed compliance requirements, termination provisions, liability allocation between franchisee and banking partner
